title: Baruchs Football Club on fire
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The first Neil Jeffery Cup...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The first Neil Jeffery Cup took place on Saturday, 5 October, at the D’Almeida Stadium, Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The first Neil Jeffery Cup took place on Saturday, 5 October, at the D’Almeida Stadium, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Four teams battled it out in the scorching heat for the cup."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Baruchs Football Club edged out Nestle FC in the first match, with the temperature reaching 37°C.","html":"Baruchs Football Club edged out Nestle FC in the first match, with the temperature reaching 37°C."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a tightly contested match, with a half-time score of 0-0.","html":"It was a tightly contested match, with a half-time score of 0-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Single goal","html":"Single goal"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Baruchs scored a single goal late in the second half, bringing the final score to Nestle 0-1 Baruchs.","html":"Baruchs scored a single goal late in the second half, bringing the final score to Nestle 0-1 Baruchs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Revolution FC took the lead early on in their match against Green Aces, by scoring from outside the box.","html":"Revolution FC took the lead early on in their match against Green Aces, by scoring from outside the box."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Green Aces responded in the second half by putting one in the back of the net.","html":"Green Aces responded in the second half by putting one in the back of the net."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery here:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Four soccer teams battle it out for Neil Jeffery Cup","html":"Four soccer teams battle it out for Neil Jeffery Cup"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Revolution FC","html":"Revolution FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the scores 1-1, Revolution FC had an the opportunity to take the lead with a penalty kick, however, the kick was not meant to be.","html":"With the scores 1-1, Revolution FC had an the opportunity to take the lead with a penalty kick, however, the kick was not meant to be."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game ended in a draw with a penalty shootout to follow.","html":"The game ended in a draw with a penalty shootout to follow."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Green Aces won 4-3.","html":"Green Aces won 4-3."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Final had it all","html":"Final had it all "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final between Baruchs and Green Aces had it all, from tackles to yellow cards and injuries in both teams.","html":"The final between Baruchs and Green Aces had it all, from tackles to yellow cards and injuries in both teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With both teams pushing hard and testing both goalkeepers numerous times, the match ended in a draw with the scores remaining 0-0.","html":"With both teams pushing hard and testing both goalkeepers numerous times, the match ended in a draw with the scores remaining 0-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A penalty shootout followed that had the goalkeepers produce spectacular saves. Baruchs, however, kept their cool and beat Green Aces 5-4 on penalties.","html":"A penalty shootout followed that had the goalkeepers produce spectacular saves. Baruchs, however, kept their cool and beat Green Aces 5-4 on penalties."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coaching team member","html":"Coaching team member"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Baruchs coaching team member Sisize Maxheke said: “The past few seasons have pushed us to new limits and taught us more than ever before.","html":"Baruchs coaching team member Sisize Maxheke said: “The past few seasons have pushed us to new limits and taught us more than ever before."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are extremely proud of our performance, surpassing our goal, which was to bring trophies to the cabinet.\"","html":"\"We are extremely proud of our performance, surpassing our goal, which was to bring trophies to the cabinet.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fired up","html":"Fired up"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the payers were fired up and determined. The tournament prize money totals R28 000.","html":"He said the payers were fired up and determined. The tournament prize money totals R28 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Founder of the tournament, Rudi Jeffery, said: “The Neil Jeffery Cup is a new football tournament hosted by clothing manufacturer Jeffery Enterprises, as a project to give back to the community.","html":"Founder of the tournament, Rudi Jeffery, said: “The Neil Jeffery Cup is a new football tournament hosted by clothing manufacturer Jeffery Enterprises, as a project to give back to the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is to bring people together, creating a fun and inclusive environment for players and spectators alike.\"","html":"\"It is to bring people together, creating a fun and inclusive environment for players and spectators alike.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Baruchs FC players with the cup.","html":"Baruchs FC players with the cup.

"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
